raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The section advances several mechanistic and causal claims—attention entropy correlates with correctness, T_phi transfers without recalibration because it operates on internal representations—that require checking for logical coherence and whether the stated mechanism actually entails the stated conclusions.","R1.3":"Quantitative claims (35–45% ECE reduction across all settings, 12-benchmark zero-shot transfer) appear without supporting tables or figures in the excerpt; whether stated numbers are properly anchored to experimental evidence is a central concern regardless of interpretation.","R1.6":"'Help me with this section' most naturally implies prose-level improvement: sentence and paragraph clarity, flow between the motivation and method blocks, and precision of technical phrasing."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Is your primary goal writing polish (prose clarity, flow, and phrasing) rather than technical critique (checking logical consistency and evidence-claim alignment)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section advances several mechanistic and causal claims—attention entropy correlates with correctness, T_phi transfers without recalibration because it operates on internal representations—that require checking for logical coherence and whether the stated mechanism actually entails the stated conclusions.
rationale.R1.3: Quantitative claims (35–45% ECE reduction across all settings, 12-benchmark zero-shot transfer) appear without supporting tables or figures in the excerpt; whether stated numbers are properly anchored to experimental evidence is a central concern regardless of interpretation.
rationale.R1.6: 'Help me with this section' most naturally implies prose-level improvement: sentence and paragraph clarity, flow between the motivation and method blocks, and precision of technical phrasing.

parsed.clarification_question: Is your primary goal writing polish (prose clarity, flow, and phrasing) rather than technical critique (checking logical consistency and evidence-claim alignment)?
